---
title: Harika Mandava
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-grid}

::: {.hero-text}
#### Transcriptome Contamination and Amoebozoa Habitat Transitions

:::
<!-- 
::: {.hero-image}
![](headshots/){alt="" class="headshot"}
![](headshots/){alt="" class="fieldshot"}
:::
-->

:::

<hr class="section-divider">

::: {.content-card}
## About Me

Your info!

My name is Harika Mandava, and I am a sophomore on the pre-med track! 
:::

<hr class="section-divider">

::: {.content-card}
## Contact

##### Harika Mandava
 

##### Email:  
[hmandava (at) wm.edu](mailto:hmandava@wm.edu)  

##### Mailing Address:    
[400 Stadium Drive, Williamsburg, VA]

---

### Find me online

- [GitHub](https://github.com/hmandava-wq)  
:::
